name: DUCKODUCKO 🦆
description: A whimsical top-down, tap-to-hop duck roguelike — play it instantly in the browser, or grab the Android APK from Releases. Shipped daily.

name: hcl-playground
description: Evaluate HCL expressions in the browser with Terraform or OpenTofu — version-aware autocomplete and docs, any version on demand, no install or init/console loop.

name: Birb Workflow
description: A one-screen pipeline for my bird photography: Lightroom → Buffer → Instagram — import, auto-tone, denoise, pick, export, then caption, resize, and schedule the keepers. (It's what feeds this gallery.)

name: grip-tracker
description: Logs and charts grip strength over time.

name: picInsight
description: Mobile app that classifies images via the AWS Rekognition API.

name: google-photos-archiver
description: A simple, fast, extensible tool to back up Google Photos to a destination of your choosing.
